subject: Fw: D.B. Zwirn & Co. Investor Communication
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, March 26, 2007 1:34:20 PM
Subject: FW: D.B. Zwirn & Co. Investor Communication


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: DBZ & Co. Investor Relations [mailto:Investor.Relations@dbzco.com] 
Sent: Monday, March 26, 2007 11:31 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: D.B. Zwirn & Co. Investor Communication


We are pleased to provide the attached letter to current investors.  Now that the Independent Review by Gibson Dunn & Crutcher LLP has been completed we continue our commitment to provide candid communication to our investors through this letter.  We ask that you limit the distribution of this letter solely to those in your organization that require such information.  If there are other parties that you believe require such information outside of your organization we would be happy to communicate with them directly.  We welcome your follow-up comments and questions and encourage you to schedule a call with us. 
 
D.B. Zwirn & Co. L.P.
745 Fifth Avenue
New York, NY  10151
T: 646-720-9100
F: 646-720-9000
IR@dbzco.com
 
 
This e-mail message is intended only for the named recipient(s) above. It may contain confidential information. If you are not the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any use, dissemination, distribution or copying of this e-mail and any attachment(s) is strictly prohibited. D.B. Zwirn & Co., L.P. reserves the right to archive and monitor all e-mail communications through its networks. If you have received this e-mail in error, please immediately notify the sender by replying to this e-mail and delete the message and any attachment(s) from your system. Thank you.


 
____________________________________________________________________________________
Get your own web address.  
Have a HUGE year through Yahoo! Small Business.
http://smallbusiness.yahoo.com/domains/?p=BESTDEAL
